message:
Clean up lint issues and configure ESLint properly

- Add jeffreyemanuel-site to ESLint ignores (duplicate nested project)
- Configure ESLint to ignore underscore-prefixed unused variables
- Add eslint-disable comments for legitimate React patterns:
  - Hydration detection (setMounted/setHasMounted in useEffect)
  - Browser feature detection (CSS.supports, matchMedia)
  - Viewport visibility detection
  - State sync from prop changes
- Remove unused error parameters in service worker catch blocks
- Remove unused Page import in playwright-tests.ts
- Rename unused seed params to _ (convention for intentionally unused)
- Remove now-unnecessary eslint-disable directives

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
